GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-oke-admins
GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.description: Landing Zone Production environment OKE platform cluster management administration access group.

GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ADMIN-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-admin
GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ADMIN-KEY.description: Landing Zone Production environment OKE platform Kubernetes RBAC administration access group.

GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-VIEWER-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-viewer
GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-VIEWER-KEY.description: Landing Zone Production environment OKE platform Kubernetes RBAC viewer access group.

PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-NETWORK-HUB-KEY.name: pcy-lz-oke-service-network-hub
PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-NETWORK-HUB-KEY.description: Grants OKE clusters network and load balancer permissions for OKE-managed public load balancers in the Landing Zone shared hub network compartment.
statements: allow any-user to manage public-ips in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to use private-ips in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage floating-ips in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage network-security-groups in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage vcns in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage load-balancers in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage network-load-balancers in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }

PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-SECURITY-KEY.name: pcy-lz-oke-service-security
PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-SECURITY-KEY.description: Grants OKE clusters, node pools, and the Block Storage service key and certificate authority permissions for OKE-managed resources and persistent volumes in the Landing Zone shared security compartment.
statements: allow any-user to use keys in compartment cmp-lz-security where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to use key-delegate in compartment cmp-lz-security where all { request.principal.type = 'nodepool' }
allow any-user to use key-delegate in compartment cmp-lz-security where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage certificate-authority-family in compartment cmp-lz-security where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow service blockstorage to use keys in compartment cmp-lz-security

PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-TAGGING-KEY.name: pcy-lz-oke-service-tagging
PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-TAGGING-KEY.description: Grants OKE clusters tag namespace permissions for OKE-managed resources in the Landing Zone role tag namespace.
statements: allow any-user to use tag-namespaces in tenancy where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', target.tag-namespace.name = 'tagns-lz-role' }

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-admins
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.description: Grants grp-lz-prod-oke-admins OKE platform administration access in the Production environment OKE platform and network compartments.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to read all-resources in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to manage cluster-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to manage instance-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use vnics in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to inspect compartments in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to read virtual-network-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use subnets in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use vnics in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to manage private-ips in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ROLE-KEY.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-rbac-roles
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ROLE-KEY.description: Grants OKE RBAC administrator and viewer groups Kubernetes cluster access in the Production environment OKE platform compartment.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-admin' to use cluster in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-viewer' to use cluster in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-COMPUTE.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-service-compute
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-COMPUTE.description: Grants OKE clusters compute permissions for OKE-managed resources in the Production environment OKE platform compartment.
statements: allow any-user to manage instances in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to read instance-images in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-NETWORK.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-service-network
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-NETWORK.description: Unsafe: grants OKE clusters network and load balancer permissions for OKE-managed resources.
statements: allow any-user to use private-ips in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage network-security-groups in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage vcns in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage load-balancers in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage network-load-balancers in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-STORAGE.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-service-storage
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-STORAGE.description: Grants OKE clusters persistent volume, backup, and file storage permissions in the Production environment OKE platform compartment.
statements: allow any-user to manage volume-backups in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to use volumes in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage file-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
